properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord You are good And Your mercy endureth forever Lord You are good And Your mercy endureth forever People from every nation and tongue From generation to generation

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: We worship You Hallelujah Hallelujah We worship You For who You are :/ You are good

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Yes You are :/ x3 So good, so good /: Yes You are :/ x3

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: You are good. all the time all the time. You are good :/ x4 /: Lord You are good and Your mercy endureth forever :/ x4 People from every nation and tongue From generation to generation
